resources.evidence_quote: go back and look at the original paper from Carl Hewitt, who published all about the actor model in the 70s

resources.title: Diagrid Conductor
resources.evidence_quote: We have a service called Dagrid Conductor that allows you to manage and operate DAPR on top of Kubernetes.

resources.title: Diagrid Catalyst
resources.evidence_quote: we have a very cool service called Diagrid Catalyst, which is think of it as a serverless offering of Dapr.
